Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants me to analyze an event log against normative rules and desiderata best practices for a loan application process

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: First let me clearly understand the normative constraints 1 Sequence Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant If Approved Finalize Documentation Close Case 2 Ordering Rules Credit Check before Risk Assessment Risk Assessment before Loan Decision Inform Applicant after Loan Decision If approved Finalize Documentation before Close Case If rejected do NOT finalize documentation before closing 3 Not Allowed Skipping activities in required sequence Changing order for example Risk Assessment before Credit Check Finalize Documentation after rejection Closing case without following decision logic

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Desiderata recommended but not strict Credit Check within 24 hours of Application Received Inform Applicant within 48 hours of Loan Decision Follow up Call before closing case encouraged but not required

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1 0900 Application Received 0930 Credit Check 30 min after app within 24h 1000 Risk Assessment after credit check OK 1100 Loan Decision Approved after risk assessment OK 1300 Inform Applicant 2 hours after decision within 48h 1330 Finalize Documentation approved so required OK 1400 Close Case after finalize OK No Follow up Call mentioned Normative No violations Sequence is perfect Desiderata Missing Follow up Call not required but recommended Timing constraints met

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 2 0800 Application Received 0820 Risk Assessment NO prior Credit Check violates normative ordering Credit Check must occur before Risk Assessment 0900 Credit Check out of order 0930 Loan Decision Rejected 1000 Finalize Documentation Rejected loan normative says do not finalize documentation before closing This is a violation 1030 Close Case No Follow up Call

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Also strictly speaking the sequence requires Credit Check before Risk Assessment and this was violated Also was Inform Applicant done No The log does not show Inform Applicant activity

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Following the loan decision the applicant must be informed of the outcome So skipping Inform Applicant is a violation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: So normative violations in Case 2 Risk Assessment before Credit Check wrong order Missing Inform Applicant skipped step Finalize Documentation after Rejection contradictory action

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 3 2024 01 12 0900 Application Received 2024 01 14 1000 Credit Check more than 24h later Jan 12 0900 to Jan 14 1000 is 49 hours This violates desideratum not normative 2024 01 14 1100 Risk Assessment after credit check normative OK 2024 01 14 1200 Loan Decision Approved after risk assessment normative OK 2024 01 16 1500 Inform Applicant Jan 14 1200 to Jan 16 1500 is 51 hours Desideratum says within 48h Violates desideratum 2024 01 17 0900 Finalize Documentation approved so required and before close normative OK 2024 01 17 1000 Close Case normative OK No Follow up Call desideratum violation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Normative for Case 3 No violations The sequence and logic are correct Desiderata violations Credit Check not within 24h of application 49h delay Inform Applicant not within 48h of loan decision 51h delay No Follow up Call

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 2 also fails desiderata by missing follow up call though its normative violations are more critical

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: For Case 2 perhaps a preliminary assessment was done based on application data while waiting for external credit bureau response but normatively it is not allowed Or maybe the process was manually overridden by a manager Or a system glitch

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Missing Inform Applicant could be that the applicant was informed orally and not logged or the system failed to record the event

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Finalize Documentation after Rejection might mean the rejection was overturned or the system logged it incorrectly Or perhaps finalize documentation here refers to rejection letter documentation but the normative says do not finalize documentation

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 3 delays could be explained by weekend or workload Jan 12 was Friday Jan 14 was Sunday and Jan 16 was Tuesday so weekend delays could explain the soft timing violations

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Case 1 follow up call may have been skipped because the process was straightforward and completed rapidly on the same day
